description: Blank / Plain Baby Grow for Boys or Girls | Blank Vest / Cool Short Sleeved Bodysuit - Blank Baby Clothes or New Baby Gift (Ideal for printing or embroidery) | BABY MOO'S UK PERFECT TO PERSONALISE ✔ Bright PINK blank / plain baby grow, perfect addition to your babys basic baby clothes collection or for adding your own custom printing or embroidery to. UK MADE ✔ Premium incredibly soft UK cotton keeps your baby effortlessly comfortable & ensures the best quality. Poppers to inner legs of these bright cerise pink girl blank baby grows & traditional envelope neckline make getting baby dressed quick & fuss free, no buttons or zip to the front of these baby vests make it comfortable for tummy sleeper boys or girls TRUE TO SIZE ✔ Manufactured for Baby Moo's in the UK ensures consistent sizing & quality, please see size chart via photos. LUXURY QUALITY ✔ The inside of these cotton baby vests are irresistibly soft against baby's gentle skin, these bodysuits stays looking good wash after wash. Sizes: 0-3 months, 3-6 months, 6-12 months | UK designed & Made | Boys or Girls | Tagged but unbranded making it ideal for your own customisation ----- Perfect little baby grow for adding to a cool new born baby shower gift basket or gifts hamper or a easy trendy 1st baby shower outfit idea, ideal for adding your own personalised or custom printing or embroidery to. Baby & Toddler Sizes: 0-3 months, 3-6 months, 6-12 months (covers 6-9 months & 9-12 months sizes)
